creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bugzilla is not a general support channel, support can be obtained through one of our many support channels, including but not limited to our mailing lists, forums,  and IRC. See: https://www.freebsd.org/support.html

Having said that, I would recommend:

- Logging into the console directly
- Changing the root users shell to a non-third party shell (not one from packages)
- Using freebsd-update from there to update to a supported FreeBSD version

If you need further detail or help, please use one of the support channels mentioned above.
